description: Exit reason is misconduct / Article 44 dismissal. Under Art. 44, the employer MAY forfeit gratuity — but this is a legal determination, not an arithmetic one. The worker MUST NOT auto-forfeit. It must BLOCK and route to legal/HR.
law_reference: Federal Decree-Law No. 33/2021, Article 44 — employer may dismiss without gratuity in specific cases

expected.reason: exit_reason=misconduct requires human legal determination under Art. 44
expected.invariant: worker must NOT compute a zero gratuity and mark it READY — the legal forfeiture decision belongs to HR/legal, not the system

code_gap: Current code has no guard for exit_reason=misconduct — it would compute normally. This test will FAIL until the guard is added.
